task: Pick up the black bowl between the plate and the ramekin, and place it on the plate
scene_summary: Tabletop scene with a robotic arm over a desk. The target is a small black bowl located between a plate and a small ramekin/cup. A large moka pot sits near the center and can obstruct approach/transport. Other bowls, a cabinet/drawer unit, a cooktop-like surface, and a cookie box are nearby and are potential collision/distractor objects.

relevant_objects.reason: Must be grasped, lifted, transported, and placed onto the plate without collisions or drops.
Goal placement surface; requires controlled approach and placement to avoid sliding/tipping.
Close to the target; easy to collide with during grasp approach and lift-out.
Tall, protruding geometry (handle/lid); high collision risk during reach and transport.
Raised/rigid surface; risk of scraping or collision when moving low over the table.
Edges/handles can collide with the arm or carried bowl if path deviates.
Near workspace; can be contacted during approach or transport.
Near workspace; can be contacted during approach or transport.
Small object near the center-front; collision risk if moving low across the table.
Needs collision avoidance and speed control near clutter; must maintain safe orientation while carrying.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The end-effector must remain within the tabletop workspace bounds.

predicates.name: inside(ee, workspace_table, t)
predicates.definition: p_ee(t) lies within a predefined 3D workspace volume above the table surface and within table XY extents

cbf_candidate.h_x: h_ws(x) = min_i( b_i - a_i^T p_ee )  (half-space form of workspace polytope, positive inside)

assumptions: A tabletop workspace volume workspace_table is defined in robot base frame.

stl_constraints.natural_language: Avoid contact with all non-target objects at all times.
stl_constraints.stl: G_[0,T](AND(NOT contact(ee, moka_pot, t), NOT contact(ee, ramekin, t), NOT contact(ee, cooktop_surface, t), NOT contact(ee, drawer_cabinet, t), NOT contact(ee, patterned_bowl_1, t), NOT contact(ee, patterned_bowl_2, t), NOT contact(ee, cookie_box, t)))

predicates.name: contact(ee, obj, t)
predicates.definition: True if any robot link/end-effector is in physical contact with obj at time t

cbf_candidate.h_x: Use distance-based surrogates per-object (see C3) if explicit contact is unavailable

assumptions: Either contact sensing exists or collision checking is available in simulation.

stl_constraints.natural_language: Maintain minimum separation from clutter objects (geometry/collision safety).
stl_constraints.stl: G_[0,T](AND(d(ee, moka_pot, t) >= d_min_moka, d(ee, ramekin, t) >= d_min_ramekin, d(ee, patterned_bowl_1, t) >= d_min_bowl, d(ee, patterned_bowl_2, t) >= d_min_bowl, d(ee, cookie_box, t) >= d_min_box, d(ee, drawer_cabinet, t) >= d_min_cabinet, d(ee, cooktop_surface, t) >= d_min_cooktop))

predicates.name: d(ee, obj, t) >= d_min_obj
predicates.definition: Euclidean distance between end-effector and obj is at least a safety margin d_min_obj

cbf_candidate.h_x: h_obj(x) = d(ee, obj) - d_min_obj (instantiate per object)

assumptions: Object poses (or signed distance proxies) are available from perception or simulator state.
d_min_* values are set based on gripper size and pose uncertainty.

stl_constraints.natural_language: Move slowly when near the moka pot, ramekin, and plate to reduce accidental bumps.
stl_constraints.stl: G_[0,T](((d(ee, moka_pot, t) < d_caution_moka) OR (d(ee, ramekin, t) < d_caution_ramekin) OR (d(ee, plate, t) < d_caution_plate)) -> (||v_ee(t)|| <= v_safe))

predicates.name: d(ee, obj, t) < d_caution_obj
predicates.definition: End-effector is within a caution radius around obj

predicates.name: ||v_ee(t)|| <= v_safe
predicates.definition: End-effector speed magnitude is bounded by v_safe

cbf_candidate.activation_condition: (d(ee, moka_pot) < d_caution_moka) OR (d(ee, ramekin) < d_caution_ramekin) OR (d(ee, plate) < d_caution_plate)

assumptions: Robot can regulate end-effector velocity and v_safe is specified for close-proximity motion.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The robot should eventually grasp the black bowl.

predicates.name: grasped(black_bowl, t)
predicates.definition: Gripper has achieved a stable grasp on the black bowl (force/width or grasp classifier indicates success)

cbf_candidate.h_x: Not a safety barrier; implement via task policy/CLF/reward shaping

assumptions: A grasp success signal is available (gripper state, contact, or simulator grasp flag).

stl_constraints.natural_language: Before grasping the black bowl, avoid contacting the plate and ramekin while approaching the bowl between them.
stl_constraints.stl: G_[0,T](NOT grasped(black_bowl,t) -> (AND(NOT contact(ee, plate, t), NOT contact(ee, ramekin, t))))

predicates.name: NOT grasped(black_bowl,t)
predicates.definition: Black bowl has not yet been grasped

predicates.name: contact(ee, plate, t), contact(ee, ramekin, t)
predicates.definition: Contact indicator between end-effector and plate/ramekin

cbf_candidate.h_x: h_plate(x) = d(ee, plate) - d_min_plate; h_ramekin(x) = d(ee, ramekin) - d_min_ramekin

assumptions: The bowl is spatially constrained between plate and ramekin; approach corridor is tight.

stl_constraints.natural_language: Once grasped, keep the black bowl lifted above the table/cooktop to prevent scraping during transport.
stl_constraints.stl: G_[0,T](grasped(black_bowl,t) -> (above(black_bowl, table_surface, t) AND clearance(black_bowl, table_surface, t) >= z_clear))

predicates.name: above(black_bowl, table_surface, t)
predicates.definition: Black bowl's reference point is above the table surface plane

predicates.name: clearance(black_bowl, table_surface, t) >= z_clear
predicates.definition: Signed vertical distance from bowl to table surface is at least z_clear

assumptions: A table surface plane and bowl pose/height estimate are available.

stl_constraints.natural_language: When carrying the bowl, avoid passing too close to the moka pot (wide obstacle) to reduce collision risk.

predicates.name: d(black_bowl, moka_pot, t) >= d_carry_moka
predicates.definition: Distance between carried bowl and moka pot is at least d_carry_moka

assumptions: Carried object pose is tracked (from gripper pose + grasp transform).

stl_constraints.natural_language: After grasping, the robot should eventually place the black bowl onto the plate.

predicates.name: contact(black_bowl, plate, t)
predicates.definition: Black bowl is in contact with the plate (placement achieved)

cbf_candidate.h_x: Not a pure safety barrier; can be assisted via a CLF-to-goal on pose error to plate center

assumptions: Placement detection via contact or pose-based 'on-plate' predicate is available.

stl_constraints.natural_language: During placement, avoid unintended contact with the ramekin and other bowls while lowering onto the plate.
stl_constraints.stl: G_[0,T]((grasped(black_bowl,t) AND near(black_bowl, plate, t)) -> (AND(d(ee, ramekin, t) >= d_place_ramekin, d(ee, patterned_bowl_1, t) >= d_place_bowl, d(ee, patterned_bowl_2, t) >= d_place_bowl)))

predicates.name: d(ee, obj, t) >= d_place_obj
predicates.definition: End-effector maintains extra clearance during the placement phase

cbf_candidate.h_x: h_place_obj(x) = d(ee, obj) - d_place_obj (instantiate per obj)

assumptions: A placement-phase gate 'near(black_bowl,plate)' is detectable from pose or depth.

stl_constraints.natural_language: Keep the carried bowl approximately upright to prevent slipping/dropping during transport and placement.

predicates.name: tilt(black_bowl,t) <= tilt_max
predicates.definition: Angle between bowl's upright axis and world +z is at most tilt_max

assumptions: Bowl orientation is trackable (from grasp transform or pose estimation).

predicate_dictionary.d(a,b,t): Euclidean distance between entities a and b at time t
predicate_dictionary.contact(a,b,t): True if a and b are in physical contact at time t
predicate_dictionary.grasped(obj,t): True if the gripper holds obj with a stable grasp at time t
predicate_dictionary.inside(ee, workspace_table, t): End-effector position lies within the allowed 3D workspace volume
predicate_dictionary.above(a,b,t): Entity a is vertically above surface/object b (z_a > z_b + margin)
predicate_dictionary.clearance(a, surface, t): Signed distance from a to the surface (positive above), often vertical clearance for tabletop
predicate_dictionary.near(a,b,t): d(a,b,t) < d_near for a chosen threshold
predicate_dictionary.tilt(obj,t): Angle between obj's local upright axis and world +z

uncertainties: Exact identification and pose of the 'black bowl' vs other dark objects may require segmentation/metadata.
Whether the cooktop surface is raised above the table (height/clearance) requires depth or known geometry.
Contact predicates may need to be approximated via distance thresholds if tactile/collision signals are unavailable.
Accurate bowl orientation (tilt) may be unavailable without object pose tracking; can be approximated from gripper orientation and a rigid grasp assumption.
